title: corethrogyne filaginifolia var. sessilis
intro: Corethrogyne filaginifolia var. sessilis is a variant of the Corethrogyne filaginifolia plant, a type of shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Corethrogyne filaginifolia var. sessilis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
